data.title: Crypto charity on rise: Giving Block sees $100M+ stablecoin donations to charities in 2025, due to US law changes.
data.description: In 2025, the fundraising platform Giving Block announced that it had facilitated over $100 million in donations of stablecoins to charitable organizations. This significant increase in donations may have been influenced by recent changes in US legislation.
According to Iran’s foreign minister, the frigate Dena carrying about 130 sailors and hosted by the Indian Navy was hit in international waters by the U.S., with no prior warning.
According to Iran’s foreign minister, the U.S. will regret the precedent it created.

data.title: BioVersys to Report Its Full Year 2025 Financial Results, Provide a Business Update and Host a Conference Call
data.description: Swiss-based BioVersys AG (SIX: BIOV), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical firm specializing in developing innovative antibacterial solutions for severe infections from multidrug-resistant (MDR) bacteria, disclosed its Full Year 2025 financial outcomes in Basel. The company also provided a business overview and intends to conduct a conference call for investors, analysts, and media representatives to discuss the results and updates.
WISeKey discloses provisional FY 2025 financial figures.

data.title: D-Link Makes Wi-Fi 7 Practical for Modern Homes and Flexible Broadband Access
data.description: D-Link Corporation has unveiled its latest Wi-Fi and 5G-Series products on March 5, 2026, in Taipei. The company's focus is on ensuring that Wi-Fi 7 upgrades are easy to access and suitable for modern lifestyles. This move aims to provide flexible broadband options for users. By prioritizing accessibility and practicality, D-Link aims to enhance the everyday user experience.

CENTCOM Requests Additional Intelligence Officers for Iran Operations Through September CENTCOM is requesting the Pentagon to send additional military intelligence officers to its headquarters in Tampa, Florida, to support operations against Iran for at least 100 days,
China plans to improve how generic drugs are evaluated and increase monitoring of usage data under its Five-Year Plan.

data.title: The Estée Lauder Companies and Forest Essentials to Enter a New Chapter in Their Long-Term Partnership
data.description: In a recent announcement, The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) revealed their plans to acquire the remaining stakes in Forest Essentials, a popular Indian beauty brand that focuses on modern Luxurious Ayurveda. The agreement, contingent upon regulatory clearances, highlights Estée Lauder's dedication to expanding the brand further. Over the course of their 18-year partnership, Estée Lauder has developed a strong relationship with Forest Essentials, and this acquisition underscores their commitment to fostering and developing this unique Indian beauty brand.
The trade agency in Malaysia helps exporters cope with blockades at sea, increased shipping costs, and supply chain problems.
Israel announced it is carrying out fresh attacks in Tehran.

data.title: Dave reveals $175M pricing for 0% Convertible Notes.
data.description: A prominent car manufacturer has announced major layoffs, affecting approximately 10,000 employees across its global operations. The company cited declining sales and the economic impact of the pandemic as reasons for the job cuts. The layoffs are expected to save the company $500 million in operating costs. This decision comes as the auto industry continues to face challenges amidst uncertain market conditions. The company plans to offer severance packages and support services to impacted employees.
China plans to optimize how innovative and essential medicines are reviewed and approved under its Five-Year Plan.
The Five-Year Plan aims to boost China’s measures against external sanctions, meddling, and long-arm legal actions.
Under its Five-Year Plan, China will take strong action against hostile forces engaging in infiltration, sabotage, subversion, or separatism.
The Five-Year Plan focuses on safeguarding major security matters for China’s lasting stability.
The Five-Year Plan aims to improve China’s rules for buying medicines and medical consumables in bulk.

data.title: Senator raises concerns about White House corruption over predictions markets on Middle East war, criticizing officials.
data.description: A senator strongly criticized prediction markets that are placing bets on conflict in the Middle East, alleging that White House officials are involved in corrupt practices.
Iran said it has not launched any missiles toward Turkey and respects its sovereignty.
